title: Trial: Redirect agent reading directives from SOPs to QMS-Docs

comment:
Pre-review of CR-101 v0.1. One deficiency found requiring correction before recommendation.

VERIFIED COMPLIANT:
- Frontmatter: title present ("Trial: Redirect agent reading directives from SOPs to QMS-Docs")
- Frontmatter: revision_summary present ("Initial draft") -- acceptable for v0.1
- All 12 required sections per SOP-002 Section 6 are present
- No prohibited placeholder content (TBD/TODO/FIXME/XXX) in pre-approved sections

- All 5 referenced QMS-Docs target files exist on disk
- EI table includes pre/post-execution commits per SOP-004
- Section numbering and formatting are consistent throughout
- No typos detected

DEFICIENCY (Section 5.4, qa.md line 181 update):
The CR states: update file path reference on line 181 from "QMS/SOP/SOP-001.md" to "QMS-Docs/QMS-Policy.md". However, line 181 of qa.md currently reads: "**To read documents:** Use the Read tool directly on file paths (e.g., QMS/SOP/SOP-001.md or QMS/SOP/SOP-001-draft.md)." This line contains TWO SOP path references. The CR only addresses one and does not provide the complete replacement text for the line. This creates execution ambiguity. Please provide the full replacement text for line 181 so the implementer knows exactly what the line should look like after the change.

REVIEWER ASSIGNMENT: No TU assignment needed. This is a document-only CR affecting agent configuration files with no technical domain code changes.

Re-review of CR-101 v0.1 (Round 2). Previous deficiency RESOLVED.

DEFICIENCY RESOLUTION: Section 5.4 now provides complete before/after text for qa.md line 181, covering both SOP path references. The "Replace" text matches actual file content at C:\Users\wilha\projects\pipe-dream\.claude\agents\qa.md line 181 exactly.
